creator: yuri@darklight.org.ru
text:
Mezz,

Thanks for commiting it. I understand that it may be not correct. Anyway, I've
submitted "bug report" to tracker bugzilla on gnome.org and hope that it would
be fixed in next release. Other patches fix numerous crashes in
tracker-search-tool on amd64 due to missing function prototypes, sorry for not
mentionting it in PR.

http://bugzilla.gnome.org/show_bug.cgi?id=470035
http://bugzilla.gnome.org/show_bug.cgi?id=470037


Thanks,
Yuri
